title: luzula lutescens
intro: Luzula lutescens, also known as the yellow-flowered woodrush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Juncaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Luzula lutescens include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antifungal activity. Luzula lutescens is typically prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
